news_items.headline: Fried returning to Yanks, set to start Game 2 of doubleheader vs. Bucs
Yankees' Max Fried to skip rehab start, return from IL and pitch Game 2 of doubleheader against Pirates
news_items.summary: The Yankees announced that southpaw Max Fried will bypass his next rehab start and return to the big league club on Wednesday. Fried will take the mound in the second game of New York's doubleheader against the Pirates.
